message:
Add recovery/export branch tests (GetInjectionForType, getAgentColor, getStateColor 100%)

- recovery: default SessionType(99) case + expanded memories to 4 for break branch
- export: unknown-state for getStateColor default + full TestGetAgentColor with 4 agent prefixes
- recovery: 94.5% → 95.6%, export: 92.0% → 93.2%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
